books.title: 银河系漫游指南

books.title: 兄弟
books.author: 余华
books.summary: 李光头与宋钢两兄弟在时代剧变中的命运沉浮，写人性的荒诞与悲怆。
books.summary_en: Two brothers navigate fortune and ruin through turbulent times, exploring human absurdity and tragedy.

books.title: 第七天
books.author: 余华
books.summary: 以亡者七日的游荡视角，在生死之间观照现实的荒诞与温情。
books.summary_en: Through a dead man's seven-day journey, the novel observes reality's absurdity and warmth between life and death.

books.title: 文城
books.author: 余华
books.summary: 林祥福携女寻妻远走他乡，于动荡乱世中写情义与寻找的执念。
books.summary_en: A man and his daughter journey far in search of his wife amid turbulent times, exploring devotion and longing.

books.title: 白鹿原
books.author: 陈忠实
books.summary: 以白鹿两家半世纪恩怨写关中乡土的宗法、变迁与人性,民族的秘史。
books.summary_en: Through the White Deer families' century-long feud, the novel chronicles Guanzhong's clans, transformation, and humanity—a hidden history of a nation.

books.title: 人生
books.author: 路遥
books.summary: 高加林在城乡之间的人生抉择与爱情得失，叩问理想与现实的张力。
books.summary_en: Gao Ganlin's life choices between city and countryside and the gains and losses in love confront the tension between ideals and reality.
key_chapters_en: Going to the city and choosing

books.title: 丰乳肥臀
books.author: 莫言
books.summary: 以母亲与众多儿女的命运写二十世纪中国乡土的苦难与生命力。
books.summary_en: A mother and her children's fates chronicle the suffering and resilience of rural China through the twentieth century.

books.title: 生死疲劳
books.author: 莫言
books.summary: 地主轮回为牲畜的六道视角，以魔幻笔法写半个世纪的乡村变迁。
books.title_en: Life and Death Are Wearing Me Out
books.summary_en: A magical realist epic spanning half a century of village transformation, told through the six realms of a landlord's reincarnation.

books.title: 红高粱家族
books.author: 莫言
books.summary: 高密东北乡的抗日传奇与爱恨情仇，以张扬笔力写民间的野性生命。
books.title_en: Red Sorghum: A Novel of China
books.summary_en: An epic of resistance and romance set in a northeastern village, celebrating the wild vitality of folk life during wartime.

books.title: 檀香刑
books.author: 莫言
books.summary: 以晚清酷刑与民间反抗为线，糅合猫腔戏曲写残酷与悲壮的历史。
books.summary_en: A tragic and magnificent history blending late Qing torture with folk resistance and traditional opera forms.

books.title: 古炉
books.author: 贾平凹
books.summary: 以烧瓷小村为缩影写特殊年代的人性裂变，细密写实的乡土长卷。
books.summary_en: A detailed rural chronicle capturing the rupture of human nature in a ceramic village during a turbulent era.
key_chapters_en: The Light and Shadow of Human Nature

books.title: 废都
books.author: 贾平凹
books.summary: 以文人庄之蝶的沉沦写都市知识分子的精神困境与时代的颓废。
books.summary_en: The spiritual crisis and decadence of urban intellectuals, explored through the decline of a cultured libertine.
key_chapters_en: The Life of a Man of Letters

books.title: 秦腔
books.author: 贾平凹
books.summary: 以一个村庄的日常琐细写乡土中国在现代化中的瓦解与挽歌。
books.summary_en: The dissolution and elegy of rural China amid modernization, told through the everyday details of a small town.

books.title: 尘埃落定
books.author: 阿来
books.summary: 以土司傻子少爷的视角写康巴藏地土司制度的兴衰与终结。
books.summary_en: The rise and fall of the tribal chieftain system through the eyes of a simpleminded Tibetan noble.

books.title: 额尔古纳河右岸
books.author: 迟子建
books.summary: 以鄂温克最后女酋长的口述写一个游猎民族的百年沧桑与挽歌。
books.title_en: The Right Bank of the Ergune River
books.summary_en: A century of upheaval and elegy for a hunting people, witnessed through the memoirs of the last Evenki female chieftain.

books.title: 长恨歌
books.author: 王安忆
books.summary: 以上海弄堂女子王琦瑶四十年的命运，写城市的繁华旧梦与女性的哀愁。
books.summary_en: Forty years in the life of a Shanghai alley woman reflect the city's glittering past and the sorrow of its women.

books.title: 繁花
books.author: 金宇澄
books.summary: 以沪语写就的上海市井浮世绘，在饭局闲谈间铺展数十年城市记忆。
books.summary_en: A panorama of Shanghai street life written in the local dialect, unfolding decades of urban memory through tavern gossip.

books.title: 北上
books.author: 徐则臣
books.summary: 以京杭大运河为线索，串起百年间几个家族与运河相连的命运。
books.summary_en: The Grand Canal threads together the destinies of several families across a century of historical change.

books.title: 应物兄
books.author: 李洱
books.summary: 以学者应物兄为中心的知识分子群像，写当代学界的众生与思想。
books.summary_en: A portrait of contemporary intellectuals centered on scholar Ying Wuxiong, capturing the diverse voices and ideas within academia.

books.title: 软埋
books.author: 方方
books.summary: 以一位失忆老人的记忆为线索，写土改往事与历史创伤的隐痛。
books.summary_en: Through an amnesia-stricken elderly woman's fragmented memory, a story of land reform and the hidden wounds of historical trauma.

books.title: 我不是潘金莲
books.author: 刘震云
books.summary: 农妇李雪莲为一句话告状二十年，以荒诞写小人物与体制的拉锯。
books.summary_en: Li Xuelian, a peasant woman, petitions for twenty years over a single sentence, depicting the absurd struggle between an ordinary person and bureaucracy.

books.title: 沉默的大多数
books.author: 王小波
books.summary: 王小波杂文集，以理性与幽默谈思维的乐趣、自由与独立思考。
books.summary_en: Wang Xiaobo's collected essays on the pleasures of thought, freedom, and independent thinking, written with rationality and wit.

books.title: 四世同堂
books.author: 老舍
books.summary: 以小羊圈胡同祁家四代写抗战时期北平市民的苦难、坚守与气节。
books.summary_en: Through four generations of the Qi family in Xiao Yangjuanhu Hutong, a portrait of Beijing citizens' suffering, resilience, and integrity during wartime.

books.title: 家
books.author: 巴金
books.summary: 以高家三兄弟的命运写封建大家庭的腐朽与青年一代的觉醒反抗。
books.summary_en: The fate of three brothers of the Gao family reveals the decay of the feudal household and the awakening resistance of youth.

books.title: 子夜
books.author: 茅盾
books.summary: 以民族资本家吴荪甫的兴败写三十年代上海的工商博弈与时代洪流。
books.summary_en: The rise and fall of capitalist Wu Sunfu chronicles Shanghai's commercial struggle and the sweep of history in the 1930s.

books.title: 彷徨
books.author: 鲁迅
books.summary: 鲁迅在新文化退潮期的小说集，写知识分子的苦闷彷徨与精神困境。
books.summary_en: Lu Xun's story collection from the waning period of the New Culture movement, capturing intellectuals' despair and spiritual crisis.

books.title: 呼兰河传
books.author: 萧红
books.summary: 萧红以童年视角回望故乡呼兰河，于诗意中写小城的寂寞与人的悲凉。
books.summary_en: Xiao Hong returns to her hometown of Hulan River through childhood memory, weaving poetry with the loneliness of a small town and human melancholy.

books.title: 金锁记
books.author: 张爱玲
books.summary: 曹七巧在情欲与黄金枷锁下扭曲一生，张爱玲苍凉笔调的巅峰之作。
books.summary_en: Cao Qiaoyu's life twisted by desire and golden shackles exemplifies Eileen Chang's most devastating prose.
key_chapters_en: Daughter of a sesame oil shop

books.title: 倾城之恋
books.author: 张爱玲
books.summary: 白流苏与范柳原在乱世香港的爱情博弈，于倾城之中成全一段姻缘。
books.summary_en: Bai Liusu and Fan Liuyuan's romantic intrigue unfolds in wartime Hong Kong, their union perfected amid a fallen city.

books.title: 红玫瑰与白玫瑰
books.author: 张爱玲
books.summary: 佟振保在红白玫瑰间的徘徊，写男性情感的自私与女性的处境。
books.summary_en: Tong Zhenbo wavers between two loves, exploring masculine selfishness and the plight of women in marriage.

books.title: 半生缘
books.author: 张爱玲
books.summary: 顾曼桢与沈世钧错过半生的爱情，于命运捉弄中写旧时代的无奈苍凉。
books.summary_en: Gu Manzhen and Shen Shijun miss their lifelong love amid fate's cruel twists, capturing the melancholy and helplessness of an old era.

books.title: 看见
books.author: 柴静
books.summary: 央视记者柴静的采访手记，于一个个新闻事件中看见人与时代的真相。
books.summary_en: CCTV journalist Chai Jing's interview notes reveal human truth and the zeitgeist through landmark news events.

books.title: 皮囊
books.author: 蔡崇达
books.summary: 以故乡亲人的故事写肉身与命运，质朴动人的非虚构散文集。
books.summary_en: A moving collection of lyrical essays told through family stories from the author's hometown, exploring flesh, fate, and survival.

books.title: 万水千山走遍
books.author: 三毛
books.summary: 三毛游历中南美洲的旅行散文，于山水人情间写漂泊与生命的况味。
books.title_en: The Thousand Autumns of Jacob de Zoet
books.summary_en: Sanmao's travel essays from Central and South America capture the essence of wandering and life through landscapes and human encounters.

books.title: 城南旧事
books.author: 林海音
books.summary: 以英子童年视角回忆老北京的人与事，于纯真中写离别与成长的怅惘。
books.title_en: Lin Hai Yin's Memoir of South City
books.summary_en: Through Yingzi's childhood memories of old Beijing, the author writes of farewells and the bittersweet ache of growing up.

books.title: 茶馆
books.author: 老舍
books.summary: 以裕泰茶馆三个时代的变迁,借众生百态写半个世纪中国社会的浮沉。
books.summary_en: Through three eras of change at the Yutai Teahouse, the novel portrays the rise and fall of Chinese society over half a century through diverse human stories.
key_chapters_en: The Curtain Falls on an Age

books.title: 雷雨
books.author: 曹禺
books.summary: 周鲁两家在一个雷雨夜爆发的命运纠葛与伦理悲剧，中国话剧巅峰。
books.summary_en: A fateful clash between the Zhou and Lu families on a stormy night unfolds as an ethical tragedy—the pinnacle of Chinese modern drama.
key_chapters_en: The Night of Thunder and Rain

books.title: 台北人
books.author: 白先勇
books.summary: 以十四个短篇写迁台人物的今昔之感，于繁华落尽中写历史的苍凉。
books.summary_en: Through fourteen interconnected stories, the author captures the nostalgia of those who relocated to Taiwan, evoking history's desolation amid fading splendor.

books.title: 孽子
books.author: 白先勇
books.summary: 以台北新公园边缘青年的故事，写被放逐者的孤独、寻找与温情。
books.summary_en: Set among marginalized youth at the edge of Taipei's New Park, this novel explores the loneliness, searching, and tenderness of the exiled.

books.title: 棋王
books.author: 阿城
books.summary: 以知青王一生的棋道与吃饭哲学，于平淡中见道家般的从容与专注。
books.summary_en: Through the life of an intellectual named Wang and his obsession with Go and philosophy of eating, the novel finds Daoist ease and focus in the ordinary.
key_chapters_en: Go and the Way of Life

books.title: 活动变人形
books.author: 王蒙
books.summary: 以倪吾诚一家写新旧文化夹缝中知识分子的精神挣扎与家庭悲剧。
books.summary_en: Through the Ni family, the novel portrays the spiritual struggle and family tragedy of intellectuals caught between old and new cultures.

books.title: 钟鼓楼
books.author: 刘心武
books.summary: 以北京钟鼓楼下一天里一场婚礼牵出的市井众生，写八十年代的人情。
books.summary_en: A single wedding day beneath Beijing's Bell and Drum Towers unravels the lives of ordinary citizens, revealing the humanity of the 1980s.

books.title: 一地鸡毛
books.author: 刘震云
books.summary: 以小林夫妇的琐碎日常写八九十年代小职员的生存困境与精神磨损。
books.summary_en: A portrait of 1980s-90s office workers' existential struggles and spiritual erosion through the mundane daily life of a couple.

books.title: 立春以后
books.author: 当代华文随笔
books.summary: 以四季流转为线的生活随笔，于草木节气间写时光的温柔与人生况味。
books.summary_en: A seasonal essay collection that captures the gentle passage of time and life's nuances through the rhythms of nature and the calendar.

books.title: 时间的礼物
books.author: 当代生活随笔
books.summary: 以从容之心面对时间与衰老，于慢生活中收获内心的丰盈与平静。
books.summary_en: Embracing time and aging with equanimity, finding inner abundance and tranquility through slow living.

books.title: 时间简史
books.author: 史蒂芬·霍金
books.summary: 霍金面向大众讲述宇宙起源、黑洞与时间的本质，现代科普的里程碑。
books.summary_en: Hawking's accessible exploration of the universe's origins, black holes, and the nature of time—a landmark in modern science writing.

books.title: 果壳中的宇宙
books.author: 史蒂芬·霍金
books.summary: 霍金以丰富图示续讲相对论、弦论与多维宇宙的前沿物理图景。
books.summary_en: Hawking illustrates cutting-edge physics through rich diagrams, covering relativity, string theory, and the multidimensional cosmos.

books.title: 上帝掷骰子吗
books.author: 曹天元
books.summary: 以生动笔法讲述量子力学的发展史与思想争鸣，硬核又好读的科普。
books.summary_en: A vivid account of quantum mechanics' development and intellectual debates—rigorous yet remarkably readable science writing.

books.title: 自私的基因
books.author: 理查德·道金斯
books.summary: 以基因为中心重新解读演化，提出觅母概念，颠覆性的进化论科普。
books.summary_en: A revolutionary rethinking of evolution through genes, introducing the concept of memes—a paradigm-shifting take on evolutionary theory.

books.title: 万物简史
books.author: 比尔·布莱森
books.summary: 以妙趣横生的笔触讲述从宇宙诞生到生命演化的科学史百科。
books.title_en: A Short History of Nearly Everything
books.summary_en: A witty encyclopedic journey through the scientific history from the universe's birth to the evolution of life.

books.title: 基因传
books.author: 悉达多·穆克吉
books.summary: 以家族遗传病为线索讲述基因科学百年史与伦理思考，叙事恢弘。
books.summary_en: A sweeping narrative tracing a century of genetics through familial inheritance patterns, blending science with ethical reflection.

books.title: 癌症传
books.author: 悉达多·穆克吉
books.summary: 以众病之王为题写人类与癌症抗争数千年的历史,深刻而动人。
books.title_en: The Emperor of All Maladies: A Biography of Cancer
books.summary_en: An epic and moving history of humanity's millennia-long struggle against cancer, the disease of kings.

books.title: 寂静的春天
books.author: 蕾切尔·卡森
books.summary: 揭露农药对生态的毁灭性影响，唤起环保意识的现代环境运动开端。
books.summary_en: Exposing pesticides' devastating ecological impact, this work sparked the modern environmental movement and awakened ecological consciousness.

books.title: 昆虫记
books.author: 法布尔
books.summary: 法布尔以诗意笔触记录昆虫世界的生活习性，科学与文学交融的经典。
books.summary_en: Fabre's poetic observations of insect life and behavior—a timeless fusion of scientific rigor and literary artistry.

books.title: 发现之旅
books.author: 托尼·赖斯
books.summary: 重现历史上伟大的自然探险与博物发现，配以精美博物插画。
books.summary_en: A richly illustrated chronicle of humanity's greatest natural expeditions and discoveries throughout history.

books.title: 国富论
books.author: 亚当·斯密
books.summary: 经济学奠基之作，论分工、市场与看不见的手如何创造国民财富。
books.summary_en: The foundational work of economics examining how division of labor, markets, and the invisible hand create national wealth.

books.title: 资本论
books.author: 卡尔·马克思
books.summary: 剖析资本主义生产方式与剩余价值的政治经济学巨著，影响深远。
books.summary_en: A seminal political economy treatise analyzing capitalist production and surplus value, with profound historical influence.

books.title: 贫穷的本质
books.author: 阿比吉特·班纳吉
books.summary: 诺奖得主以田野实验探究贫穷的成因与脱贫之道，颠覆诸多直觉。
books.summary_en: A Nobel laureate's field experiments investigating the roots of poverty and pathways to prosperity, overturning conventional wisdom.

books.title: 国家为什么会失败
books.author: 德隆·阿西莫格鲁
books.summary: 以制度视角解释国家贫富分化,包容性制度与汲取性制度的命运分野。
books.summary_en: An institutional analysis of national inequality and the divergent fates of inclusive versus extractive societies.

books.title: 乡土中国
books.author: 费孝通
books.summary: 费孝通剖析中国乡村社会结构,差序格局等概念奠定本土社会学根基。
books.title_en: From the Soil: The Foundations of Chinese Society
books.summary_en: Fei Xiaotong's seminal study of Chinese rural social structure, establishing foundational concepts for indigenous sociology.

books.title: 江村经济
books.author: 费孝通
books.summary: 以开弦弓村为样本的人类学田野调查,中国乡村经济研究的开创之作。
books.summary_en: Pioneering ethnographic fieldwork in Kaihsienkung village, a foundational study of China's rural economy.

books.title: 枪炮与货币
books.author: 当代经济史
books.summary: 从战争与金融交织的视角讲述近代世界经济格局的形成与博弈。
books.summary_en: An exploration of modern global economic structures and geopolitical contests through the lens of warfare and finance.

books.title: 黑天鹅
books.author: 纳西姆·塔勒布
books.summary: 论极端不可预测事件如何主宰历史与市场,警惕被随机性愚弄。
books.summary_en: An examination of how extreme unpredictable events dominate history and markets, cautioning against the illusions of randomness.

books.title: 灿烂千阳
books.author: 卡勒德·胡赛尼
books.summary: 两代阿富汗女性在战乱与压迫中相互扶持,写苦难中的母性与坚韧。
books.summary_en: Two generations of Afghan women sustain each other through war and oppression in this story of maternal strength and resilience.

books.title: 群山回唱
books.author: 卡勒德·胡赛尼
books.summary: 以兄妹离散为核心的多线叙事,跨越半个世纪写亲情与命运的回响。
books.summary_en: A multi-threaded narrative spanning half a century, exploring family bonds and destiny through the separation of siblings.

books.title: 偷影子的人
books.author: 马克·李维
books.summary: 能偷别人影子的男孩在成长中聆听他人心声,温暖治愈的爱情成长故事。
books.title_en: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
books.summary_en: A boy who can steal shadows listens to others' hearts, in this tender coming-of-age story about love and healing.

books.title: 岛上书店
books.author: 加布瑞埃拉·泽文
books.summary: 孤僻书店老板因一个弃婴重获爱与联结,献给爱书人的治愈小说。
books.summary_en: A reclusive bookstore owner finds love and connection through an abandoned infant in this healing novel for book lovers.

books.title: 一个人的朝圣
books.author: 蕾秋·乔伊斯
books.summary: 退休老人哈罗德徒步穿越英格兰探望故友,一场救赎自我的心灵朝圣。
books.summary_en: A retired man named Harold walks across England to visit an old friend, undertaking a spiritual pilgrimage of self-redemption.

books.title: 摆渡人
books.author: 克莱儿·麦克福尔
books.summary: 少女死后由摆渡人护送穿越荒原,在生死之间收获勇气与爱情。
books.summary_en: After her death, a young girl is ferried across a desolate wasteland, gaining courage and love between life and death.

books.title: 无声告白
books.author: 伍绮诗
books.summary: 华裔家庭少女之死揭开身份认同与父母期待的重压,我们终将摆脱他人期待。
books.summary_en: A Chinese-American girl's death exposes the crushing weight of identity and parental expectations, as we learn to break free.

books.title: 小小小小的火
books.author: 伍绮诗
books.summary: 两个家庭因领养纠纷碰撞,探讨母性身份阶层与规则的张力。
books.summary_en: Two families collide over an adoption dispute, exploring the tensions between motherhood, class, and societal rules.

books.title: 解忧杂货店续篇式治愈小说
books.author: 当代治愈小说
books.summary: 以一间深夜小店为舞台,陌生人在此倾诉烦恼并彼此疗愈的温暖故事。
books.summary_en: Strangers confess their troubles at a late-night shop where they find healing and solace in each other's stories.

books.title: 一个叫欧维的男人决定去死
books.author: 弗雷德里克·巴克曼
books.summary: 古板孤僻的欧维在邻居闯入后重拾生活温度,笑中带泪的治愈佳作。
books.summary_en: A gruff and withdrawn man named Ove rediscovers warmth in life when a neighbor moves in next door, a touching tale of healing.

books.title: 外婆的道歉信
books.author: 弗雷德里克·巴克曼
books.summary: 七岁女孩按外婆遗愿送出道歉信,在过程中读懂爱与告别的童话。
books.summary_en: A seven-year-old girl delivers apology letters as her grandmother wished, learning about love and farewell along the way.

books.title: 天蓝色的彼岸
books.author: 艾利克斯·希尔
books.summary: 小男孩死后重返人间向亲友告别,以童话笔触写珍惜当下与爱的告别。
books.title_en: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
books.summary_en: A young boy returns to the living world after death to say goodbye to loved ones in this fairy-tale meditation on cherishing life and love.

books.title: 夏目友人帐式温情物语
books.author: 治愈系物语
books.summary: 少年继承能看见妖怪的能力,在归还名字的旅途中收获理解与羁绊。
books.summary_en: A boy inherits the ability to see demons and journeys to return their names, discovering understanding and bonds along the way.

books.title: 琅琊榜
books.author: 海宴
books.summary: 含冤雪藏的麒麟才子化名梅长苏重返京城,以智谋搅动朝局昭雪冤案。
books.summary_en: A falsely accused talented minister disguises himself as Mei Changsu and returns to the capital, using wisdom to overturn injustice.

books.title: 甄嬛传
books.author: 流潋紫
books.summary: 少女甄嬛在深宫步步为营从天真走向凌厉,写宫廷权谋与女性成长。
books.summary_en: A naive young woman named Zhen Huan navigates the imperial palace with cunning schemes, chronicling court intrigue and feminine transformation.

books.title: 庆余年
books.author: 猫腻
books.summary: 范闲身负现代记忆穿越古代,在庙堂江湖间周旋的权谋成长传奇。
books.summary_en: A young man with modern memories navigates ancient courts and underworld through political intrigue and strategic growth.

books.title: 赘婿
books.author: 愤怒的香蕉
books.summary: 现代灵魂宁毅穿越为商贾赘婿,以智慧在古代商海与乱世中立足成长。
books.summary_en: A modern soul reborn as a merchant's son-in-law uses cunning to survive in ancient commerce and turbulent times.

books.title: 将夜
books.author: 猫腻
books.summary: 少年宁缺携桑桑入书院修行,在命运与天意之间走出自己的道。
books.summary_en: A young scholar and his companion embark on cultivation, carving their own path between fate and divine will.

books.title: 斗破苍穹
books.author: 天蚕土豆
books.summary: 少年萧炎从天才沦为废柴又逆袭崛起,热血励志的玄幻爽文代表作。
books.summary_en: A once-gifted youth falls to mediocrity before rising again in this emblematic hot-blooded fantasy epic.

books.title: 天官赐福
books.author: 墨香铜臭
books.summary: 飞升又跌落的太子谢怜与鬼王花城的羁绊,糅合仙侠奇幻与深情。
books.summary_en: A fallen heavenly prince and the ghost king's bond blends immortal fantasy with profound tenderness.

books.title: 默读
books.author: Priest
books.summary: 刑警与顾问联手侦破连环案件,以悬疑推理串起人性与正义的拷问。
books.summary_en: A detective and consultant solve serial murders while exploring humanity and the cost of justice.

books.title: 镇魂
books.author: Priest
books.summary: 特别调查处处长与神秘搭档守护人鬼两界秩序,奇幻悬疑交织的故事。
books.summary_en: The head of Special Investigation and a mysterious partner maintain order between mortal and spirit realms.

books.title: 花千骨
books.author: fresh果果
books.summary: 上古神女花千骨与师父白子画的虐恋仙侠,写情劫与命运的纠葛。
books.summary_en: An ancient goddess and her master's tormented romance explores karmic bonds and tragic destiny.

books.title: 步步惊心
books.author: 桐华
books.summary: 现代女子穿越清朝卷入九子夺嫡与情感漩涡,清穿言情的代表作。
books.summary_en: A modern woman thrust into Qing dynasty politics and a succession struggle navigates love and intrigue.

books.title: 何以笙箫默
books.author: 顾漫
books.summary: 赵默笙与何以琛相隔七年重逢续写旧情,如果世界上曾经有那个人出现过。
books.summary_en: Two lovers reunite seven years later to rekindle what once was—a tale of lasting devotion.

books.title: 微微一笑很倾城
books.author: 顾漫
books.summary: 游戏内外校园情侣甜蜜相恋,轻松治愈的青春甜宠言情代表作。
books.title_en: Wei Wei Yi Xiao Hen Qing Cheng
books.summary_en: Campus sweethearts blossom both in-game and in reality in this light, heartwarming teen romance.

books.title: 你好旧时光
books.author: 八月长安
books.summary: 余周周的成长与暗恋青春,以细腻笔触写校园里温暖明亮的旧时光。
books.summary_en: A girl's growth and secret crush unfold with tender prose capturing the warmth of cherished school memories.

books.title: 最好的我们
books.author: 八月长安
books.summary: 耿耿与余淮高中同桌的青涩暗恋,写最普通也最美好的青春记忆。
books.summary_en: A tender secret crush between high school deskmates Geng Geng and Yu Huai captures the most ordinary yet beautiful memories of youth.
key_chapters_en: Years of the College Entrance Exam

books.title: 致我们终将逝去的青春
books.author: 辛夷坞
books.summary: 郑微的大学爱情与成长,写青春的炽热冲动与成长后的释然。
books.title_en: Zhi Wo Men Zhong Jiang Shi Qu de Qing Chun
books.summary_en: Zheng Wei's university love and coming-of-age journey traces the passionate fervor of youth and the wisdom found in letting go.

books.title: 三生三世十里桃花
books.author: 唐七
books.summary: 白浅与夜华跨越三生三世的虐恋仙侠,写情深缘浅与轮回相守。
books.title_en: Three Lives Three Worlds The Peach Blossoms
books.summary_en: A tragic romance spanning three lifetimes between Bai Qian and Ye Hua weaves immortal love with the debt of fate across cycles of rebirth.

books.title: 芈月传
books.author: 蒋胜男
books.summary: 芈月从楚国公主到秦国太后的传奇一生,写战国宫廷的权谋与成长。
books.summary_en: Mi Yue's legendary ascent from Chu's princess to Qin's empress unveils the court intrigues and personal growth of the Warring States era.

books.title: 知否知否应是绿肥红瘦
books.author: 关心则乱
books.summary: 庶女明兰在宅斗中步步为营经营人生,写古代家宅的生存智慧与成长。
books.title_en: Do You Know What Day It Is Today
books.summary_en: The concubine's daughter Ming Lan strategically navigates household politics, embodying the survival wisdom and resilience of ancient domestic life.

books.title: 大江东去
books.author: 阿耐
books.summary: 以宋运辉等人写改革开放三十年经济变迁,致敬奋斗者的恢弘群像。
books.summary_en: Through Song Yunhui and others, this epic saga chronicles China's economic transformation during thirty years of reform and opening-up.
key_chapters_en: The Return of the College Entrance Exam

books.title: 欢乐颂
books.author: 阿耐
books.summary: 五个都市女性合租生活中的职场情感与成长,写当代女性的众生相。
books.summary_en: Five urban women sharing an apartment navigate careers and relationships, reflecting the diverse lives of contemporary women.

books.title: 都挺好
books.author: 阿耐
books.summary: 苏家因母亲离世暴露的原生家庭矛盾,写亲情债务与和解的现实命题。
books.summary_en: The Su family's hidden fractures surface after their mother's passing, probing the complex debts of kinship and the path to reconciliation.

books.title: 神们自己
books.author: 阿西莫夫
books.summary: 围绕平行宇宙能量交换的危机,阿西莫夫自评最佳的硬科幻佳作。
books.summary_en: A crisis involving energy exchange across parallel universes—Asimov's own favorite hard science fiction masterpiece.

books.title: 仿生人会梦见电子羊吗
books.author: 菲利普·迪克
books.summary: 赏金猎人追捕仿生人的故事,叩问何为人性的赛博朋克奠基之作。
books.title_en: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
books.summary_en: A bounty hunter pursues artificial beings in this cyberpunk classic that interrogates the very nature of humanity.

books.title: 献给阿尔吉侬的花束
books.author: 丹尼尔·凯斯
books.summary: 智障青年经手术变天才又退回,以日记体写智识情感与尊严的动人寓言。
books.summary_en: A cognitively disabled young man becomes a genius through surgery, then declines again—a poignant diary-form parable on intellect, emotion, and dignity.

books.title: 唐诗三百首
books.author: 蘅塘退士
books.summary: 流传最广的唐诗选本,荟萃李杜王孟等名家名篇,中华诗教经典。
books.title_en: Three Hundred Poems of the Tang Dynasty
books.summary_en: The most widely circulated anthology of Tang poetry, gathering masterpieces by Li Bai, Du Fu, Wang Wei, Meng Haoran and others—the cornerstone of Chinese poetic tradition.

books.title: 宋词三百首
books.author: 上彊村民
books.summary: 婉约豪放兼收的宋词选本,苏辛柳李俱在,尽显宋词的情韵之美。
books.title_en: Three Hundred Poems of the Song Dynasty
books.summary_en: A comprehensive anthology of Song-dynasty poetry featuring both refined and bold styles from masters like Su Shi and Xin Qiji, showcasing the emotional beauty of the form.

books.title: 人间词话
books.author: 王国维
books.summary: 王国维以境界说论词,熔中西美学于一炉的古典文学批评经典。
books.title_en: Remarks on the Human Condition through Ci Poetry
books.summary_en: Wang Guowei's classical literary criticism merging Eastern and Western aesthetics through his theory of artistic境界 (aesthetic realm).
key_chapters_en: Realms with and without the self

books.title: 诗经
books.author: 佚名
books.summary: 中国最早的诗歌总集,风雅颂三体写尽先民的劳作爱情与礼乐。
books.summary_en: China's earliest poetry anthology, with its three categories capturing ancient life through labor, love, and ritual music.

books.title: 纳兰词
books.author: 纳兰性德
books.summary: 纳兰性德哀感顽艳的词作,人生若只如初见道尽至情至性的清代第一词人。
books.summary_en: The poignant and passionate verse of Nalan Xingde, the greatest Qing-dynasty poet, encapsulating life's deepest emotions in the line "if only life were always as it first appeared."

books.title: 飞鸟集
books.author: 泰戈尔
books.summary: 泰戈尔短小隽永的哲理小诗集,于自然意象中流露对生命爱与美的礼赞。
books.summary_en: Tagore's concise philosophical poems celebrating love, beauty, and life's meaning through imagery drawn from nature.

books.title: 草叶集
books.author: 惠特曼
books.summary: 惠特曼自由奔放的诗集,以宏阔之声讴歌自我自然与民主的生命力。
books.summary_en: Whitman's exuberant poetry celebrating the self, nature, and democratic vitality with expansive voice.

books.title: 如何阅读一本书
books.author: 莫提默·艾德勒
books.summary: 教你掌握检视分析与主题阅读四层次,提升深度阅读能力的经典指南。
books.summary_en: A classic guide to mastering four levels of reading—from inspectional to analytical to thematic—to deepen your comprehension skills.

books.title: 学习之道
books.author: 芭芭拉·奥克利
books.summary: 结合脑科学讲解专注与发散模式番茄工作法,助你高效学习攻克难题。
books.summary_en: A brain-science approach to the Pomodoro Technique, leveraging focused and diffuse thinking modes to boost learning and problem-solving.

books.title: 认知天性
books.author: 彼得·布朗
books.summary: 以认知科学揭示有效学习之道,检索式练习与间隔学习胜过反复重读。
books.title_en: Make It Stick: The Science of Successful Learning
books.summary_en: Cognitive science reveals that retrieval practice and spaced learning trump passive rereading for effective retention.

books.title: 费曼学习法
books.author: 理查德·费曼相关
books.summary: 以教代学的费曼技巧,通过简化讲解暴露漏洞,实现真正的深度理解。
books.summary_en: The Feynman Technique uses teaching others to uncover knowledge gaps and achieve genuine deep understanding.

books.title: 超级学习者
books.author: 斯科特·扬
books.summary: 以快速自学项目为例,提炼专注直接训练等高效自学的九大原则。
books.summary_en: Drawing on rapid self-learning projects, this book distills nine principles for effective self-directed learning including focus and deliberate practice.

books.title: 纳瓦尔宝典
books.author: 埃里克·乔根森
books.summary: 硅谷投资人纳瓦尔关于财富与幸福的思考集,授人以渔的人生智慧。
books.summary_en: Silicon Valley investor Naval Ravikant's insights on wealth and happiness offer timeless wisdom on empowering yourself.

books.title: 毫无意义的工作
books.author: 大卫·格雷伯
books.summary: 剖析现代社会大量无意义工作的存在与危害,反思工作的价值与异化。
books.summary_en: An analysis of meaningless work in modern society and its harms, questioning the value and alienation inherent in labor.

books.title: 怦然心动的工作整理魔法
books.author: 近藤麻理惠
books.summary: 将整理魔法用于工作,通过整理桌面时间与人脉打造怦然心动的事业。
books.title_en: The Life-Changing Magic of Tidying Up
books.summary_en: Applying organizing principles to work life, building a fulfilling career through tidying your workspace, time, and relationships.

books.title: 软技能
books.author: 约翰·森梅兹
books.summary: 面向程序员的人生指南,涵盖职业理财健身与自我营销的全方位软实力。
books.summary_en: A comprehensive life guide for programmers covering career development, personal finance, fitness, and self-marketing.

books.title: 浪潮之巅
books.author: 吴军
books.summary: 讲述科技公司兴衰与产业规律,揭示站在浪潮之巅的成败逻辑。
books.summary_en: Tracing the rise and fall of tech giants and industry dynamics, revealing the logic behind success at the crest of innovation.

books.title: 数学之美
books.author: 吴军
books.summary: 以通俗语言讲述信息技术背后的数学之美,搜索与自然语言处理的原理。
books.summary_en: Exploring the mathematical foundations of information technology in accessible language, demystifying search engines and natural language processing.

books.title: 世界observed
books.author: 当代深度报道集
books.summary: 以扎实的非虚构报道呈现世界各地的人与事,在细节中看见时代褶皱。
books.title_en: The World Observed: Contemporary In-Depth Reportage
books.summary_en: A rigorous work of narrative nonfiction presenting people and stories from around the world, revealing historical moments in fine detail.

books.title: 夏洛的网
books.author: E·B·怀特
books.summary: 蜘蛛夏洛用网上的字救下小猪威尔伯,写友谊承诺与生命的温柔童话。
books.summary_en: Charlotte the spider saves young pig Wilbur with words woven into her web, a tender tale of friendship, promise, and mortality.

books.title: 绿野仙踪
books.author: 莱曼·鲍姆
books.summary: 多萝西与伙伴沿黄砖路寻找心智勇气与回家之路的奇幻童话经典。
books.summary_en: Dorothy and her companions journey down the yellow brick road seeking wisdom, courage, and the way home in this classic fantasy.

books.title: 草房子
books.author: 曹文轩
books.summary: 以油麻地少年桑桑的成长,写苦难纯真与人性之美的成长小说。
books.summary_en: Following young Sangxiang's coming of age in Youmaidi, a novel of hardship, innocence, and the beauty of human nature.

books.title: 青铜葵花
books.author: 曹文轩
books.summary: 哑巴男孩青铜与城市女孩葵花相依成长,写苦难中的温情与美。
books.summary_en: Silent boy Bronze and city girl Azalea grow up together, a story of warmth and beauty born from hardship.

books.title: 解密
books.author: 麦家
books.summary: 天才数学家容金珍破译密码的孤独人生,写天赋与命运的隐秘较量。
books.summary_en: A mathematical genius named Rongjin's solitary life breaking codes, a tale of talent and fate's hidden struggle.

books.title: 风声
books.author: 麦家
books.summary: 密室之中谁是卧底老鬼,层层反转的谍战推理与信仰的较量。
books.summary_en: In a locked room, who is the hidden mole? A layered espionage thriller of suspicion and belief.

books.title: 追忆似水年华
books.author: 普鲁斯特
books.summary: 以玛德琳蛋糕唤起的回忆为引,意识流书写时间记忆与艺术的鸿篇。
books.summary_en: A sweeping meditation on memory and art triggered by the taste of a madeleine cake, written in stream of consciousness.

books.title: 尤利西斯
books.author: 詹姆斯·乔伊斯
books.summary: 记述都柏林一天的意识流巨著,以现代手法重写奥德赛的精神漫游。
books.summary_en: A modernist masterpiece chronicling a single day in Dublin through stream of consciousness, reimagining the Odyssey for contemporary times.

books.title: 鼠疫
books.author: 加缪
books.summary: 奥兰城突发鼠疫,众人面对灾难的抗争与坚守,写荒诞中的反抗与团结。
books.summary_en: An outbreak of plague strikes the city of Oran, revealing humanity's struggle and resilience in the face of catastrophe.

books.title: 等待戈多
books.author: 萨缪尔·贝克特
books.summary: 两个流浪汉永无止境地等待从不出现的戈多,荒诞派戏剧的代表作。
books.summary_en: Two vagrants wait endlessly for Godot who never arrives, a landmark of the absurdist theatre.

books.title: 约翰·克利斯朵夫
books.author: 罗曼·罗兰
books.summary: 音乐家克利斯朵夫一生的奋斗与精神成长,英雄主义的生命交响。
books.summary_en: The lifelong struggle and spiritual growth of the musician Christophe, a symphony of heroic endeavor.

books.title: 飞鸟与鱼:生活美学随笔
books.author: 当代美学随笔
books.summary: 于日常器物草木饮食中发现美,写慢生活里的审美与心灵安顿。
books.title_en: Birds and Fish: Essays on the Aesthetics of Living
books.summary_en: Discovering beauty in everyday objects, nature, and simple meals—a meditation on aesthetics and the poetry of slow living.

books.title: 美的历程
books.author: 李泽厚
books.summary: 李泽厚纵览中华数千年艺术之美,从龙飞凤舞到明清文艺的美学历程。
books.summary_en: Li Zehou surveys thousands of years of Chinese artistic beauty, tracing the aesthetic journey from ancient totems to Ming and Qing literati arts.
key_chapters_en: The Elegance of Wei and Jin
The Music of the Tang Dynasty

books.title: 观看之道
books.author: 约翰·伯格
books.summary: 伯格剖析图像观看背后的意识形态与权力,改变看待艺术的方式。
books.summary_en: Berger analyzes the ideology and power dynamics embedded in visual perception, fundamentally transforming how we look at art.

books.title: 蛙【中国诺奖得主代表作】
books.author: 莫言
books.summary: 通过乡村妇科医生姑姑的故事，展现生育政策变化下的人间百态与生命伦理。
books.summary_en: A Nobel Prize-winning novel that explores the joys and sorrows of childbirth through a rural midwife's journey amid shifting policies and human struggles.

books.title: 聊斋志异
books.author: [清]蒲松龄著 侯海博主编
books.summary: 清代文言短篇小说集，通过狐仙鬼怪故事反映人间百态，抨击官僚腐败与歌颂纯美爱情。
books.title_en: Strange Tales from a Chinese Studio
books.summary_en: A classic collection of fantastical tales using supernatural creatures to critique social corruption and celebrate pure love across the human and spirit worlds.
key_chapters_en: Pure love between humans and spirits

books.title: 儒林外史
books.author: [清]吴敬梓
books.summary: 讽刺小说杰作，揭露八股文化毒害下的儒生虚伪，塑造真正独立自由的知识分子理想。
books.summary_en: A masterpiece of satirical fiction exposing the hypocrisy of scholars corrupted by exam-focused culture while celebrating those who pursue authentic freedom and virtue.

books.title: 镜花缘
books.author: [清]李汝珍
books.summary: 奇幻长篇小说，创造诸国异域想象世界，在浪漫虚幻中探问人类生存的终极意义。
books.summary_en: A fantastical novel of imagined kingdoms that explores humanity's place in the cosmos through whimsical worlds while meditating on mortality and existence.

books.title: 莫斯科不相信眼泪
books.author: 张锡模
books.summary: 俄罗斯留学随笔，记录生活细节，深入社会议题，展现俄国人民的真实生活和精神世界。
key_chapters: 俄罗斯日常生活的细腻观察

books.summary: 北大哲学博士文聘元十年心血之作，生动呈现精神分析学派创始人弗洛伊德才华与传奇的一生及伟大学术历程。
key_chapters: 精神分析学说的创立与发展
个人生活中的爱情与友谊困境
面对攻击与疾病的坚守
books.summary_en: A decade-long scholarly work presenting Freud's brilliant yet turbulent life, his groundbreaking psychoanalytic theories, and his personal struggles against criticism and illness.
key_chapters_en: Creation and Development of Psychoanalytic Theory

books.title: 荣格自传
books.author: [瑞士]荣格
books.summary: 荣格以神话与象征的方式讲述潜意识自我充分发挥的故事，探索个人成长与内在想象力的深层意义。
key_chapters: 潜意识的自我充分表现
books.summary_en: Jung's profound autobiography narrated through myth and symbolism, exploring how the unconscious self strives for expression and how personal growth emerges from inner imagination.
key_chapters_en: The Unconscious Self and Its Expression
The Dialogue Between Myth and Science
The Spiritual Journey of Personal Growth

books.title: 维特根斯坦传
books.author: 李海峰 孙骜
books.summary: 聚焦20世纪重要哲学家维特根斯坦的一生与思想，从富裕而心灵困苦的童年到逻辑哲学革命的完成。
key_chapters: 维也纳背景与早期哲学困惑
《逻辑哲学论》与前期革命成果
books.summary_en: A comprehensive biography tracing Wittgenstein's intellectual journey from a troubled Viennese childhood through his revolutionary contributions to analytic philosophy.
key_chapters_en: Vienna's Influence and Early Philosophical Struggles

books.title: 帕斯卡尔思想录
books.author: [法]布莱士·帕斯卡尔
books.summary: 帕斯卡尔以锐利笔触揭示人性矛盾——追求真理与幸福却陷入迷失，融合哲学与神学反思人类存在的本质困境。
key_chapters: 人的本质与无法自足的矛盾
信仰的困境与精神秩序
骄傲、欲望与人类的迷失
books.summary_en: Pascal's masterwork probing the fundamental contradictions of human nature—the pursuit of truth and happiness set against an inescapable tendency toward self-deception and spiritual emptiness.
key_chapters_en: The Paradox of Human Nature and Self-Insufficiency
The Dilemma of Faith and Spiritual Order

books.title: 孔子传
books.author: 钱穆
books.summary: 钱穆以《论语》为主综合考证，重新为孔子作传，呈现这位中国历史第一大圣人「学不厌、教不倦」的一生与教育事业。
key_chapters: 孔子的成长与学问之道
books.summary_en: A comprehensive reevaluation of Confucius's life and thought, emphasizing his tireless pursuit of learning and his revolutionary educational mission that shaped Chinese civilization.
key_chapters_en: Confucius's Path of Learning and Self-Cultivation
The Depth and Breadth of His Educational Legacy

books.title: 莎士比亚传
books.author: [英] 阿克罗伊德
books.summary: 阿克罗伊德以非凡想象力将莎士比亚的人生与伦敦城市浑然融合，呈现一个事实与想象交织的丰满莎翁世界。
key_chapters: 斯特拉特福到伦敦的人生轨迹
伦敦戏剧世界与社会百态
创意想象与史料的融合
books.summary_en: A vivid biography interweaving Shakespeare's personal journey with 16th-century London, blending historical fact with imaginative interpretation to create a rich portrait of the playwright.
key_chapters_en: From Stratford to London: A Life in Motion
Theater, City, and the Social Panorama

books.title: 但丁传
books.author: 薄伽丘/布鲁尼
books.summary: 布鲁尼在薄伽丘传记基础上，更加关注但丁事业的严肃与实质部分，提供更平衡全面的诗人形象。
key_chapters: 诗歌创作与《神曲》的成就
books.summary_en: Bruni's biographical account of Dante that balances personal romance with serious intellectual and political dimensions, offering a more comprehensive portrait than earlier accounts.
key_chapters_en: Poetry and the Achievement of the Divine Comedy

books.title: 简·奥斯汀传
books.author: 詹姆斯·爱德华·奥斯汀-利
books.summary: 简·奥斯汀侄子所作的首部传记，尽管掩盖了她的罗曼史，却为20世纪奥斯汀研究奠定基础。
key_chapters: 简·奥斯汀的家族与生平
个人生活中的隐秘部分
books.summary_en: The first published biography of Jane Austen by her nephew, offering valuable insights into her life and literary work while inadvertently revealing gaps that sparked centuries of scholarly investigation.

books.title: 狄更斯传
books.author: 彼得·阿克罗伊德
books.summary: 阿克罗伊德以圆形叙事从狄更斯之死开篇结尾，深入呈现这位英国文坛巨匠的人生与创作的超凡力量。
books.summary_en: Ackroyd's masterful biography of Dickens frames the author's remarkable life through his death, capturing his extraordinary ability to move readers and his revolutionary impact on literature and social consciousness.

books.title: 汤姆叔叔的小屋
books.author: 斯陀夫人
books.summary: 通过信仰虔诚的黑奴汤姆的悲惨命运，揭示美国奴隶制度的罪恶本质。
books.summary_en: A powerful indictment of American slavery through the tragic fate of Tom, a devout enslaved man whose faith and sacrifice expose the moral evils of the institution.

books.title: 哈克贝利·费恩历险记
books.author: 马克·吐温
books.summary: 哈克贝利与逃亡奴隶吉姆沿密西西比河历险，探索自由、友谊与人性。
books.summary_en: A coming-of-age adventure following Huckleberry Finn's journey down the Mississippi River with a runaway slave, exploring freedom, friendship, and morality.

books.title: 浮生六记
books.author: [清]沈复 著 拾木文化 审校
books.summary: 沈复用温柔清澈的文字记述与妻子芸娘的爱情故事与人生阅历。
books.title_en: Six Records of a Floating Life
books.summary_en: A poignant autobiographical essay in elegant prose depicting the tender love between Shen Fu and his wife Yun amid the joys, sorrows, and small beauties of ordinary life.

books.title: 金瓶梅（别名：金瓶梅词话）
books.author: [明]兰陵笑笑生
books.summary: 通过西门庆家族的罪恶生活，揭露明代中叶社会黑暗腐败与世态人心。
books.summary_en: A masterwork of Ming literature depicting the corrupt, hedonistic life of merchant-tyrant Ximen Qing and his households, revealing the moral decay and social darkness of the era.

books.title: 孽海花
books.author: [清]曾朴著 张明高校注
books.summary: 以状元与名妓的婚姻故事为线，反映晚清同治至光绪期间政治文化变迁。
books.summary_en: A late-Qing critique novel interweaving a scholar-official's marriage to a courtesan with historical events, illustrating the political and cultural transformations of the era.

books.title: 老残游记
books.author: [清]刘鹗
books.summary: 老残游历见闻，批评清官害民，融儒释道思想与社会评论于一体。
books.summary_en: A philosophical late-Qing novel following a wandering healer's journey through corrupt bureaucracy, exploring the paradox that well-intentioned officials harm the people, interwoven with Confucian, Buddhist, and Daoist wisdom.

books.title: 命若琴弦（轻经典）
books.author: 史铁生
books.summary: 师徒二人凭琴弦求生，善意谎言赋予生活希望，思辨生命意义的本质。
books.summary_en: A philosophical tale of a blind master and apprentice whose survival depends on a false prophecy, exploring how the pursuit of meaning itself constitutes the entirety of life.
key_chapters_en: The Illusion and Reality of Life

books.title: 重生绿茶：黑莲花嫡女 × 咸鱼世子
books.author: 梅果
books.summary: 重生女主拒嫁冷心世子，凭智谋与胆识在权谋宅斗中自保反杀。
books.title_en: Reborn as a Green Tea: The Black Lotus Legitimate Daughter and the Salty Fish Heir
books.summary_en: A reborn protagonist refuses her neglectful husband and schemes her way through palace intrigue with wit and cunning, only to discover her lazy brother-in-law harbors dangerous secrets.

books.title: 赤地之恋
books.author: 张爱玲
books.summary: 战争时代背景下，爱情显得渺茫，灵魂被鲜血浸染而错乱。
books.summary_en: Set against the backdrop of war, this novella explores how violence and upheaval corrupt the possibility of genuine love, leaving souls stained and disoriented.

books.title: 献给艾米丽的一朵玫瑰
books.author: 威廉·福克纳
books.summary: 福克纳精选短篇集，描绘内战后南方传统与现代价值观的冲突与衰落。
books.title_en: A Rose for Emily and Other Stories
books.summary_en: A collection of Faulkner's most representative stories depicting the collision between Southern tradition and Northern modernity following the Civil War, with twisted prose revealing the decay of declining aristocracy.

books.title: 人类大历史
books.author: [英]伊恩·克夫顿  [英]杰里米·布莱克
books.summary: 从宇宙大爆炸到现代世界，揭示人类历史的六大背景与关键拐点，建构宏观历史框架。
books.title_en: A Brief History of Humankind: From the Big Bang to the Modern World
books.summary_en: A sweeping narrative from cosmic origins through six pivotal eras—revealing humanity's journey from insignificance to dominance and the turning points that shaped our world.
key_chapters_en: Origins of the Universe and Life

books.title: 暗时间（第2版）
books.author: 刘未鹏
books.summary: 从心理学和认知科学视角，教你如何高效思考、反思和学习，无形中赢得额外的人生时间。
books.title_en: Dark Time: The Power of Productive Thinking
books.summary_en: Discover how to master reflective thinking and cognitive science to unlock hidden productive time and multiply your lifetime value through effective learning.
key_chapters_en: The Value of Different Thinking Styles

books.title: 学习如何学习（《学习的本质》的作者升华之作）
books.author: 安德烈·焦尔当 （法)吉约姆·萨尔戴著 沈珂译
books.summary: 揭示学习本质是理解而非记忆，为学生、学者和职场人士提供实用学习方法与工具。
books.title_en: Learning How to Learn: Unlocking the Power of Understanding
books.summary_en: A practical guide revealing that understanding—not memorization—is the foundation of learning, with actionable methods for students, scholars, and professionals across all life stages.
key_chapters_en: Understanding as the Key to Learning

books.title: 宇宙的琴弦（第一推动丛书·物理系列）
books.author: 布莱恩·R. 格林
books.summary: 著名弦理论家格林用优雅简洁的语言揭示十一维宇宙的奥秘，展示物质与能量的深层本质。
books.title_en: The Elegant Universe: Superstrings, Hidden Dimensions, and the Quest for the Ultimate Theory
books.summary_en: A masterful exploration of string theory revealing an eleven-dimensional universe where all matter vibrates from microscopic energy loops, making cutting-edge physics accessible and inspiring.
key_chapters_en: The Structure of a Multi-Dimensional Universe
The Nature of Matter and Energy

books.title: 生命是什么
books.author: 埃尔温·薛定谔
books.summary: 物理学大师薛定谔从物理视角探讨生命本质，启发了分子生物学的诞生与发展。
books.title_en: What is Life? The Physical Aspect of the Living Cell
books.summary_en: A seminal work where Nobel laureate Schrödinger bridges physics and biology, asking what distinguishes living from non-living matter and inspiring the birth of molecular biology.

books.title: 延伸的表型
books.author: [英]理查德·道金斯
books.summary: 道金斯扩展基因表型概念，揭示基因影响如何延伸至环境和他者，深化演化论理解。
books.title_en: The Extended Phenotype: The Long Reach of the Gene
books.summary_en: Dawkins expands the concept of the phenotype beyond the organism, demonstrating how genes influence the wider environment and behavior of other species, revolutionizing evolutionary theory.
key_chapters_en: The Concept of the Extended Phenotype
The Debate Over Units of Selection

books.title: 行为经济学讲义：演化论的视角
books.author: 汪丁丁
books.summary: 汪丁丁教授从演化论视角讲解行为经济学，整合神经经济学与实验经济学的新进展。
key_chapters: 行为经济学的学科基础
神经经济学与实验经济学
books.title_en: Lectures on Behavioral Economics: An Evolutionary Perspective
books.summary_en: Distinguished economist Wang Dingding integrates neuroscience, experimental research, and evolutionary theory to provide a unified framework for understanding behavioral economics.

books.title: 人工智能的未来
books.author: Jeff Hawkins/Sandra Blakeslee
books.summary: 硅谷成功企业家霍金斯重新定义真正的人工智能，基于对人脑皮层运作原理的新理论。
books.title_en: On Intelligence: How a New Understanding of the Brain Will Lead to the Creation of True Artificial Intelligence
books.summary_en: Hawkins revolutionizes AI by grounding it in the actual workings of the human neocortex—memory, prediction, and pattern recognition—rather than pure computation.
key_chapters_en: A New Theory of Neocortical Function

books.title: 平台革命：改变世界的商业模式
books.author: 杰奥夫雷G.帕克 马歇尔W.范·埃尔斯泰恩 桑基特·保罗·邱达利
books.summary: 解析平台商业模式如何连接生产者与消费者，揭示互联网时代的盈利之道与发展前景。
books.title_en: Platform Revolution: How Networked Markets Are Transforming the Economy and How to Make Them Work for You
books.author_en: Geoffrey G. Parker, Marshall W. Van Alstyne, Sangeet Paul Choudary
books.summary_en: A definitive guide to understanding platform business models—how they facilitate value exchange between producers and consumers—and their transformative power in the digital economy.

books.title: 网络效应：浪漫主义、资本主义与互联网
books.author: [美]托马斯·斯特里特
books.summary: 探讨文化如何塑造互联网发展，再现二十世纪下半叶互联网在美国的产生与繁荣历程。
key_chapters: 浪漫主义与互联网文化
books.title_en: Network Effects: Romanticism, Capitalism, and the Internet
books.summary_en: An incisive cultural history examining how romanticism, capitalism, and ideology shaped the internet's development in America from its inception through its rise to dominance.
key_chapters_en: The Social Construction of Network Effects

books.title: 第二次机器革命
books.author: 埃里克·布莱恩约弗森 安德鲁·麦卡菲
books.summary: 数字技术驱动第二次机器革命，深刻改变经济社会结构和职业前景。
key_chapters: 数字技术的颠覆性力量
books.title_en: The Second Machine Age: Work, Progress, and Prosperity in a Time of Brilliant Technologies
books.summary_en: Digital technology drives a second machine revolution that will fundamentally transform economics, employment, and society.

books.title: 极简主义
books.author: 乔舒亚·菲尔茨·米尔本 瑞安·尼科迪默斯
books.summary: 通过舍弃物质和生活杂物，找回健康、关系、热情、成长和奉献的人生意义。
books.summary_en: Minimalism teaches you to shed material excess and refocus on five core values: health, relationships, passion, growth, and contribution.

books.title: 滚雪球：巴菲特和他的财富人生（套装共2册）
books.author: 艾丽斯·施罗德
books.summary: 巴菲特从挫折到成功的投资人生，展现其商业思想与财富积累的完整轨迹。
books.title_en: Snowball: Warren Buffett and the Business of Life
books.summary_en: A comprehensive biography tracing Warren Buffett's journey from setbacks to investment success, revealing his investment philosophy and business wisdom.

books.title: 巴菲特致股东的信：投资者和公司高管教程（原书第4版）
books.author: 沃伦E.巴菲特 劳伦斯A.坎宁安
books.summary: 汇编巴菲特伯克希尔年报精华，为投资者和公司高管提供实战经营教程。
books.title_en: Berkshire Hathaway Letters to Shareholders: Investment and Corporate Governance Manual (4th Edition)
books.author_en: Warren E. Buffett, Lawrence A. Cunningham
books.summary_en: A curated collection of Buffett's most insightful shareholder letters, offering investors and executives practical wisdom on value creation and corporate stewardship.

books.title: 随机漫步的傻瓜
books.author: 纳西姆·尼古拉斯·塔勒布
books.summary: 揭示随机性在成功中的隐形作用，教会人们如何在不确定世界中理性决策。
key_chapters: 投资决策中的概率思维
books.title_en: Fooled by Randomness: The Hidden Role of Chance in Life and in the Markets
books.summary_en: Taleb reveals how randomness and luck, rather than skill alone, often determine success, teaching readers to recognize and leverage probability in an uncertain world.
key_chapters_en: The relationship between luck and success

books.title: 经济学通识课
books.author: 尼尔·基什特尼
books.summary: 通俗讲解40余个经济学理论，从古典经济学到行为经济学的完整发展历程。
key_chapters: 当代经济现象的经济学解读
books.title_en: Economics in One Lesson: An Introduction to Economic Principles
books.summary_en: A witty and accessible introduction to over 40 essential economic theories and their historical development, from Adam Smith to behavioral economics.

books.title: 经济增长的阶段
books.author: 罗斯托
books.summary: 分析世界各国经济发展阶段，从传统社会到成熟阶段的现代化历程论证。
key_chapters: 传统社会向现代化的转变
各国发展路径比较分析
books.title_en: The Stages of Economic Growth: A Non-Communist Manifesto
books.summary_en: Rostow's influential theory of economic development traces nations through distinct stages from traditional society to maturity, providing a framework for understanding modernization.
key_chapters_en: Transition from traditional to modern society
Comparative analysis of national development paths

books.title: 帝国
books.author: 戒念
books.summary: 北宋嘉佑年间，一位青衫路人踏上远行，探寻人生意义与权力博弈的精彩故事。
books.summary_en: A wanderer in Song Dynasty embarks on a transformative journey, navigating power struggles and moral complexity in a turbulent era.
key_chapters_en: Interweaving of jianghu and imperial court

books.title: 信息简史
books.author: 詹姆斯·格雷克
books.summary: 从鼓语到信息论，追溯人类信息传递与处理的演进史及其深远影响。
key_chapters: 信息时代的挑战与应对
books.title_en: The Information: A History, A Theory, A Flood
books.summary_en: Gleick traces humanity's relationship with information from African drums to Shannon's information theory, exploring how information shapes civilization.
key_chapters_en: Creation and revolution of information theory
Challenges and responses in the information age

books.title: 众病之王：癌症传
books.author: 悉达多·穆克吉
books.summary: 以医学、文化、社会视角呈现癌症的历史、现状与人类对抗疾病的不懈努力。
key_chapters: 癌症的起源与发展演变
医学对抗癌症的历史进程
books.title_en: The Emperor of All Maladies: A Biography of Cancer
books.summary_en: A humanistic chronicle of cancer's history, medical breakthroughs, and humanity's ongoing struggle against disease told through compelling patient stories and scientific insight.
key_chapters_en: Historical progress in medical battle against cancer
Philosophical reflections on life and death

books.title: 人体简史
books.author: [英]比尔·布莱森
books.summary: 从单细胞到现代人类，揭示30亿年人体进化史与生理奥秘的科普佳作。
books.title_en: The Body: A Guide for Occupants
books.summary_en: A fascinating exploration of human body evolution over three billion years, revealing biological mysteries and anatomical quirks through engaging scientific storytelling.

books.title: 营养圣经
books.author: 帕特里克•霍尔福德
books.summary: 权威营养学专家的科学指南，阐明营养与健康关系，提供个性化饮食方案。
books.summary_en: A comprehensive guide by an international nutrition expert revealing the science of nutrition and providing personalized dietary solutions for optimal health.

books.title: 大脑的秘密：心理预期
books.author: 冉光明
books.summary: 深度研究心理预期机制，探讨预期对认知和行为的深层影响与应用。
books.title_en: The Secrets of the Brain: Psychological Expectation
books.summary_en: An in-depth exploration of psychological expectation mechanisms, examining how expectations encode perception and transform human behavior and cognition.

books.title: 亲密关系：通往灵魂的桥梁+无拘无束的关系（套装共2册）
books.author: [加]克里斯多福·孟
books.summary: 探讨亲密关系本质，建立通往灵魂的桥梁，实现自由与深层连接的关系艺术。
books.title_en: Intimate Relationships: Bridge to the Soul & Freedom in Relationship
books.summary_en: A two-volume exploration of intimate relationships as bridges to the soul, teaching how to build authentic, liberated connections with profound emotional depth.

books.title: 成为母亲：一名知识女性的自白
books.author: 蕾切尔·卡斯克
books.summary: 知识女性的生育自白，真实记录怀孕生产如何重塑女性身份、自由与存在意义。
books.title_en: A Life's Work: On Becoming a Mother
books.summary_en: A candid, introspective account of motherhood that explores how pregnancy, childbirth, and parenting fundamentally reshape a woman's identity, freedom, and sense of self.

books.title: 教养的迷思：父母的教养方式能否决定孩子的人格发展？
books.author: 朱迪斯·哈里斯
books.summary: 颠覆传统教养观念，证明同辈群体而非父母教养决定儿童人格与社会化发展。
books.title_en: The Nurture Assumption: Why Children Turn Out the Way They Do
books.summary_en: A groundbreaking critique of parenting-focused psychology, arguing that peer groups and external experiences, not parental influence, primarily shape a child's personality and socialization.

books.title: 孩子如何学习
books.author: 艾莉森·高普尼克 安德鲁·梅尔佐夫 帕特里夏·库尔
books.summary: 世界儿童发展专家揭示婴幼儿学习奥秘，展现孩子如科学家般的探索天赋与学习方式。
books.title_en: The Scientist in the Crib: What Early Learning Tells Us About the Mind
